name.description: Name of the data stream, which must meet the following criteria: Lowercase only; Cannot include ``, `/`, `*`, `?`, `"`, `<`, `>`, `|`, `,`, `#`, `:`, or a space character; Cannot start with `-`, `_`, `+`, or `.ds-`; Cannot be `.` or `..`; Cannot be longer than 255 bytes. Multi-byte characters count towards this limit faster.

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.

timeout.description: Period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
